child_spec.reasoning_summary: iter_0005 island 3 (multi_stream_bigru) stochastic mutation. Strategies sampled (rng_seed=50505): ['scale_fusion_dropout']. After Level 2 HIP-H accepted novelty_alpha 0.3->0.45, this batch uses composite scoring (Pareto+novelty+ECE+acc) for tournament + stochastic-sampled mutation strategies to inject variance lost in iter_0001-iter_0004.
